author: chetachiezikeuzor
description: A minimal and aesthetically pleasing highlighting menu that makes color-coded highlighting much easier with a configurable assortment of highlight colors.

manifest.author: chetachi
manifest.description: A minimal and aesthetically pleasing highlighting menu that makes color-coded highlighting much easier with a configurable assortment of highlight colors 🎨.
manifest.name: Highlightr

name: Highlightr

releases.author: chetachiezikeuzor
releases.description: - Add setting for css classes - Cleaner UI in settings tab - Major change schema (user will need to completely refresh their data (delete `data.json` file)) - Highlighter commands now come with color cohesive svgs ![Highlightr v1 1 3](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/79069364/144160274-cc10065a-927c-4665-8a56-c44bbdcf3fd3.png) ![classes-setting](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/79069364/142739116-1f092654-9a02-4de4-b81a-a4e81a09369c.gif)
releases.name: Highlightr 1.1.3

releases.author: chetachiezikeuzor
releases.description:
Added settings to change highlight styles.

![Highlightr 1 1 2](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/79069364/137590998-a3fb8730-a3a0-4865-b51b-935920119d07.png)
![highlighterStyles](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/79069364/144177518-5d06f8cc-271e-40f0-bf9e-e2e292108481.gif)
releases.name: Highlightr 1.1.2

releases.author: chetachiezikeuzor
releases.description: - Added command to remove highlight (``) - Updated undo highlight functionality - Creating empty highlight now adds space at the end ![Highlightr 1 1 0](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/79069364/137434451-695eb49d-1c93-401a-8187-7f20b0902f7e.png) ![removehighlightcommand](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/79069364/144177046-dcbe13b4-57c0-4944-9cf1-cb6bb3f8eb7a.gif)
releases.name: Highlightr 1.1.0

releases.author: chetachiezikeuzor
releases.description:
- Commands are automatically removed from command library after color deletion.
- Check added to see that activeView isn't null

![Highlightr 1 0 1](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/79069364/137028480-01571d3b-3b21-49c5-a8c8-a769c80f3cdc.png)
releases.name: Highlightr 1.0.1

releases.author: chetachiezikeuzor
releases.description:
This is the initial release of Highlightr Plugin:
- Custom highlighter commands
- Open highlighter menu on command
- Add highlighter menu to context menu

![Highlightr 1 0 0](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/79069364/136876631-392495ab-62ac-4625-a23f-bf9e678d01c1.png)
releases.name: Highlightr 1.0.0
